text_original: well, it does what it lets you know in those advertenties, jut not the naughty pictures stuff. that's a ly. even with a Pro account, you won't get them. hell some words can be a big no no. bu some chats. but in overall, it works like it does
text_zh: 嗯，它确实能做到广告里宣传的那些功能，只是没有那些羞羞的图片。那是骗人的。即使有Pro账户，你也得不到。甚至有些词是绝对的禁忌。不过有些聊天还可以。但总的来说，它确实能用。
reply_original: Hi there! Thanks for your honest review. To comply with Google Play's strict platform policies, we cannot allow nude images or overly explicit text, even for Pro accounts. We must keep these safety filters active. If you have any other questions or feedback, please email us at support@fantachat.ai. We appreciate your understanding!
reply_zh: 你好！感谢您的坦诚评价。为了遵守 Google Play 严格的平台政策，即使是专业版账户，我们也不允许出现裸露图片或过于露骨的文字。我们必须保持这些安全过滤机制处于启用状态。如果您有任何其他问题或反馈，请发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。感谢您的理解！
